import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
  let n = parts.len()
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let tok = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let doubled = v * 2
    if i == 0
      out = "#{doubled}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{doubled}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
